label: Evaluation

label: url
notes: Nested under 'Dataset location'. Provide a URL to the dataset, if available, or to the original paper that proposed the dataset Alias note: Alias for pgmr:url. Added to tolerate model-generated PGMR placeholder variants during deterministic restore.

notes: Nested under 'Evaluation'. What metrics are used to evaluate the implemented approach(?

notes: What natural language processing task is your study tackling?

notes: Nested under 'NLP task'. What type of natural language processing task is your study tackling?

label: NLP task output

label: NLP task output type
notes: Nested under 'NLP task output'. What is the output type of your natural language processing task?

label: NLP task output extracted element
notes: Nested under 'NLP task output'. What is the type of the element extracted in your natural language processing information extraction task?

label: NLP task output translation mapping cardinality
aliases: nlp task output translation mapping cardinality
notes: Nested under 'NLP task output'. What is the translation mapping cardinality between the initial input and final output in your natural language processing translation task?

label: NLP dataset
notes: What natural language processing dataset is your study using?

label: NLP data item
notes: Nested under 'NLP dataset'. How many data items do you process? Please report the numerical information and details about all the data that is used in your evaluation.

label: NLP data production time
notes: Nested under 'NLP dataset'. In which year or interval of year were the data produced?

label: NLP data source
notes: Nested under 'NLP dataset'. What is the source of the data?

label: NLP data source type
notes: Nested under 'NLP data source'. What is the source type of the data?

label: Number of data sources
notes: Nested under 'NLP data source'. From how many different sources your data comes from?

label: NLP data source domain
notes: Nested under 'NLP data source'. Please list which domains your data belongs to (e.g., automotive, satellite, entertainment, information systems).

label: NLP data abstraction level
notes: Nested under 'NLP dataset'. What is the level of abstraction of the data (not limited to requirements)?

label: NLP data type
notes: Nested under 'NLP dataset'. What is the type of the data?

label: NLP data format
notes: Nested under 'NLP data type'. What is the format of the data?

label: Rigor of data format
notes: Nested under 'NLP data type'. How rigorous is the format of the data?

label: Natural language
notes: Nested under 'NLP data type'. What is the natural language of the data (if applicable) ?

label: Public availability
notes: Nested under 'License'. Is the dataset publicly available?

label: License type
notes: Nested under 'Implemented approach'. What license has been used?

label: Dataset location
notes: Nested under 'NLP dataset'. Where is the dataset stored?
